1→/**
     2→ * Video URL Validation Schema
     3→ *
     4→ * Validates video URLs for online competition submissions.
     5→ * Supports YouTube, Vimeo, and Streamable URL formats with video ID extraction.
     6→ */
     7→
     8→import { z } from "zod"
     9→
    10→/**
    11→ * Supported video platforms
    12→ */
    13→export const VIDEO_PLATFORMS = ["youtube", "vimeo", "streamable"] as const
    14→export type VideoPlatform = (typeof VIDEO_PLATFORMS)[number]
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * Result of parsing a video URL
    18→ */
    19→export interface ParsedVideoUrl {
    20→	platform: VideoPlatform
    21→	videoId: string
    22→	originalUrl: string
    23→	embedUrl: string
    24→	thumbnailUrl: string
    25→	/** Privacy hash for unlisted Vimeo videos */
    26→	privacyHash?: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * YouTube URL patterns:
    31→ * - youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID
    32→ * - youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID&t=123s (with timestamp)
    33→ * - youtu.be/VIDEO_ID
    34→ * - youtu.be/VIDEO_ID?t=123 (with timestamp)
    35→ * - youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID
    36→ * - youtube.com/v/VIDEO_ID
    37→ * - youtube.com/shorts/VIDEO_ID
    38→ * - m.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID (mobile)
    39→ * - www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID
    40→ */
    41→const YOUTUBE_PATTERNS = [
    42→	// Standard watch URL
    43→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.|m\.)?youtube\.com\/watch\?(?:.*&)?v=([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})(?:&.*)?$/,
    44→	// Short URL
    45→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?youtu\.be\/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})(?:\?.*)?$/,
    46→	// Embed URL
    47→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?youtube\.com\/embed\/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})(?:\?.*)?$/,
    48→	// Old-style /v/ URL
    49→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?youtube\.com\/v\/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})(?:\?.*)?$/,
    50→	// Shorts URL
    51→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?youtube\.com\/shorts\/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})(?:\?.*)?$/,
    52→] as const
    53→
    54→/**
    55→ * Vimeo URL patterns:
    56→ * - vimeo.com/VIDEO_ID
    57→ * - vimeo.com/VIDEO_ID?share=copy (with params)
    58→ * - vimeo.com/VIDEO_ID/HASH (unlisted videos with privacy hash)
    59→ * - player.vimeo.com/video/VIDEO_ID
    60→ * - player.vimeo.com/video/VIDEO_ID?h=HASH (unlisted embed)
    61→ * - www.vimeo.com/VIDEO_ID
    62→ * - vimeo.com/channels/CHANNEL/VIDEO_ID
    63→ * - vimeo.com/groups/GROUP/videos/VIDEO_ID
    64→ */
    65→const VIMEO_PATTERNS = [
    66→	// Unlisted URL with privacy hash (must be before standard pattern)
    67→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?vimeo\.com\/(\d+)\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    68→	// Standard URL
    69→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?vimeo\.com\/(\d+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    70→	// Player embed URL with hash
    71→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?player\.vimeo\.com\/video\/(\d+)\?(?:.*&)?h=([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(?:&.*)?$/,
    72→	// Player embed URL without hash
    73→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?player\.vimeo\.com\/video\/(\d+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    74→	// Channel video URL
    75→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?vimeo\.com\/channels\/[^/]+\/(\d+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    76→	// Group video URL
    77→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?vimeo\.com\/groups\/[^/]+\/videos\/(\d+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    78→] as const
    79→
    80→/**
    81→ * Streamable URL patterns:
    82→ * - streamable.com/VIDEO_ID
    83→ * - www.streamable.com/VIDEO_ID
    84→ * - streamable.com/e/VIDEO_ID (embed URL)
    85→ *
    86→ * Streamable video IDs are alphanumeric, typically 5-7 characters
    87→ */
    88→const STREAMABLE_PATTERNS = [
    89→	// Standard URL
    90→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?streamable\.com\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    91→	// Embed URL
    92→	/^(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?streamable\.com\/e\/([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(?:\?.*)?$/,
    93→] as const
    94→
    95→/**
    96→ * Extract video ID from YouTube URL
    97→ */
    98→function extractYouTubeId(url: string): string | null {
    99→	for (const pattern of YOUTUBE_PATTERNS) {
   100→		const match = url.match(pattern)
   101→		if (match?.[1]) {
   102→			return match[1]
   103→		}
   104→	}
   105→	return null
   106→}
   107→
   108→/**
   109→ * Extract video ID and optional privacy hash from Vimeo URL
   110→ */
   111→function extractVimeoId(url: string): { id: string; hash?: string } | null {
   112→	for (const pattern of VIMEO_PATTERNS) {
   113→		const match = url.match(pattern)
   114→		if (match?.[1]) {
   115→			return {
   116→				id: match[1],
   117→				hash: match[2] || undefined,
   118→			}
   119→		}
   120→	}
   121→	return null
   122→}
   123→
   124→/**
   125→ * Extract video ID from Streamable URL
   126→ */
   127→function extractStreamableId(url: string): string | null {
   128→	for (const pattern of STREAMABLE_PATTERNS) {
   129→		const match = url.match(pattern)
   130→		if (match?.[1]) {
   131→			return match[1]
   132→		}
   133→	}
   134→	return null
   135→}
   136→
   137→/**
   138→ * Parse a video URL and extract platform and video ID
   139→ * Returns null if URL is not from a supported platform
   140→ */
   141→export function parseVideoUrl(url: string): ParsedVideoUrl | null {
   142→	const trimmedUrl = url.trim()
   143→
   144→	// Try YouTube first
   145→	const youtubeId = extractYouTubeId(trimmedUrl)
   146→	if (youtubeId) {
   147→		return {
   148→			platform: "youtube",
   149→			videoId: youtubeId,
   150→			originalUrl: trimmedUrl,
   151→			embedUrl: `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${youtubeId}`,
   152→			thumbnailUrl: `https://img.youtube.com/vi/${youtubeId}/maxresdefault.jpg`,
   153→		}
   154→	}
   155→
   156→	// Try Vimeo
   157→	const vimeoResult = extractVimeoId(trimmedUrl)
   158→	if (vimeoResult) {
   159→		// For unlisted videos, include the privacy hash in the embed URL
   160→		const embedUrl = vimeoResult.hash
   161→			? `https://player.vimeo.com/video/${vimeoResult.id}?h=${vimeoResult.hash}`
   162→			: `https://player.vimeo.com/video/${vimeoResult.id}`
   163→		return {
   164→			platform: "vimeo",
   165→			videoId: vimeoResult.id,
   166→			originalUrl: trimmedUrl,
   167→			embedUrl,
   168→			// Vimeo thumbnails require API access, use placeholder
   169→			thumbnailUrl: `https://vumbnail.com/${vimeoResult.id}.jpg`,
   170→			privacyHash: vimeoResult.hash,
   171→		}
   172→	}
   173→
   174→	// Try Streamable
   175→	const streamableId = extractStreamableId(trimmedUrl)
   176→	if (streamableId) {
   177→		return {
   178→			platform: "streamable",
   179→			videoId: streamableId,
   180→			originalUrl: trimmedUrl,
   181→			embedUrl: `https://streamable.com/e/${streamableId}`,
   182→			// Streamable thumbnails via their CDN
   183→			thumbnailUrl: `https://cdn-cf-east.streamable.com/image/${streamableId}.jpg`,
   184→		}
   185→	}
   186→
   187→	return null
   188→}
   189→
   190→/**
   191→ * Check if a URL is from a supported video platform
   192→ */
   193→export function isSupportedVideoUrl(url: string): boolean {
   194→	return parseVideoUrl(url) !== null
   195→}
   196→
   197→/**
   198→ * Get a human-readable list of supported platforms
   199→ */
   200→export function getSupportedPlatformsText(): string {
   201→	return "YouTube, Vimeo, or Streamable"
   202→}
   203→
   204→/**
